goal: Add META step to /generate-foundation-docs (canonical at ASSISTANT/SKILLS/CORE/generate-foundation-docs/) that emits .coderef/foundation-docs-meta.json after every successful generate+enhance run. Per the Q5 DOC-AGE-EXPOSURE decision: sibling JSON in .coderef/, absolute UTC last_regenerated_at per doc, computed-on-read by LLOYD (~50us warm cache). Producer is the orchestrating skill (only place with global view + trigger context). Implements per-Q5 §3 schema (per-doc + aggregate fields).

phases.name: SCHEMA
phases.description: SCHEMA: define scripts/doc-gen/foundation-docs-meta.schema.json (Draft 2020-12) per Q5 section 3 — required schema_version, project_id, generated_at, minimum/maximum_last_regenerated_at, docs map (per-doc fields: last_regenerated_at, generator, source_artifacts, byte_size, content_hash, kind, human_authored), trigger sub-object (kind enum + workorder_id + session_id).

tasks.description: Author scripts/doc-gen/foundation-docs-meta.schema.json (Draft 2020-12) with all required fields per Q5 section 3.
Verify schema is parseable JSON and uses the canonical $schema URI.
Commit Phase 1: SCHEMA.
Hard stop: schema reviewed before WRITER starts.

phases.name: WRITER
phases.description: WRITER: scripts/doc-gen/generate-meta-json.js. Reads coderef/foundation-docs/*.md mtimes + sizes + sha256 hashes; loads project_id from package.json or .coderef/context.json fallback; assembles per-doc + aggregate object; atomic temp+rename write to .coderef/foundation-docs-meta.json. Self-validates against the schema before write.

tasks.description: Author scripts/doc-gen/generate-meta-json.js: reads 8 foundation-docs, sha256 content_hash, mtime->ISO 8601 UTC, package.json project name, atomic temp+rename, schema self-validation before write.
Smoke test: run generate-meta-json.js against current CODEREF-CORE; verify .coderef/foundation-docs-meta.json appears with all 8 docs and aggregate minimum/maximum.
Commit Phase 2: WRITER.
Hard stop: writer output reviewed before trigger-provenance wiring.

phases.name: TRIGGER PROVENANCE
phases.description: TRIGGER PROVENANCE: writer reads CODEREF_META_TRIGGER_KIND, CODEREF_META_WORKORDER_ID, CODEREF_META_SESSION_ID env vars; defaults trigger.kind to 'manual' when unset. Documents env-var contract in script header.

tasks.description: Add env-var read in scripts/doc-gen/generate-meta-json.js: CODEREF_META_TRIGGER_KIND (default 'manual'), CODEREF_META_WORKORDER_ID (optional), CODEREF_META_SESSION_ID (optional) -> trigger sub-object.

Smoke test: CODEREF_META_TRIGGER_KIND=workorder_phase_6 CODEREF_META_WORKORDER_ID=WO-TEST-001 node scripts/doc-gen/generate-meta-json.js; verify trigger.kind=workorder_phase_6 + trigger.workorder_id=WO-TEST-001 in output.
Commit Phase 3: TRIGGER PROVENANCE.
Hard stop: trigger plumbing reviewed before TEST.

phases.name: TEST
phases.description: TEST: __tests__/foundation-docs-meta-writer.test.mjs — runs the writer in a fixture project, validates output JSON against schema, asserts per-doc last_regenerated_at matches mtime, content_hash is 64-char hex, aggregate minimum_at <= maximum_at, trigger.kind plumbed through from env, no .tmp residue, LLOYD-style Python-equivalent read computes age cheaply.

tasks.description: Author __tests__/foundation-docs-meta-writer.test.mjs: builds fixture project (8 minimal foundation-docs), runs writer with trigger env vars, validates output against schema, asserts per-doc + aggregate fields.
Run the test; expect PASS.
Commit Phase 4: TEST.
Hard stop: test verified before SKILL.md edit.

phases.name: CLOSE
phases.description: CLOSE: edit ASSISTANT/SKILLS/CORE/generate-foundation-docs/SKILL.md to insert Step 4.5 META between Step 4 (enhance) and Step 5 (validate); bump skill version 2.1.0 -> 2.2.0; standard close-out (universal Phase 6 gate self-tests the META step on close).

tasks.description: ASSISTANT/SKILLS/CORE/generate-foundation-docs/SKILL.md: insert Step 4.5 META between Step 4 (enhance) and Step 5 (validate); bump version 2.1.0 -> 2.2.0; reference the new helper script.
Run /close-workorder against this WO (manual close path); universal Phase 6 gate self-tests the META step.
Verify .coderef/foundation-docs-meta.json was written by the gate; trigger.kind reflects close context.
Commit Phase 5: CLOSE + skill edit.
Hard stop: final approval.

plan_type_rationale: Public-contract change (/generate-foundation-docs SKILL.md gains a new step + bumps version) + new canonical artifact (.coderef/foundation-docs-meta.json — LLOYD reads on every request) + cross-cutting schema. Strict plan_type per dispatch-006 explicit specification.
